use_cases: Landing page hero sections for cryptocurrency and fintech platforms
SaaS product landing pages requiring immersive visual impact
Dark-themed marketing sites seeking animated 3D backgrounds
Tech company homepages with premium visual presentation
Web3 and blockchain project showcase pages
ai_summary: An immersive 3D hero section component featuring WebGL-powered laser beam effects with animated wisps, fog, and mouse-reactive tilt parallax. Built with Three.js and custom GLSL shaders, it renders a futuristic laser flow animation in dark mode with customizable color, density, and motion parameters. Includes minimal navigation icons (Search, Bell, Settings) positioned for standard app chrome.
